description_long: This is a vibrant, retro-styled keytar with a predominantly purple body and a black-and-white keyboard on its front face. The instrument features a long, angular neck with blue and pink accents and three circular buttons, giving it a futuristic look. A checkered black-and-white strap is attached for wearing over the shoulder, enhancing its portability for street or stage performances. The front panel displays a digital interface with text and colored lines, suggesting electronic controls or display features. The back of the instrument is mostly plain purple with a small sticker or logo near the edge. The overall design is playful and eye-catching, suitable for urban musicians or performers in public spaces.
description: A purple, retro-futuristic keytar with a black-and-white keyboard, digital display, and checkered strap, accented with blue and pink details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, digital display, and colorful neck with three buttons.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the instrument's slim profile and the checkered strap hanging down.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain purple back, checkered strap attachment, and a small sticker or logo.
description_view_3: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the body and the length of the neck.
attribute_headstock_design: angular, elongated with blue tip and three circular buttons, no visible tuning pegs
